fields.value: I fisici Leonard e Sheldon e gli amici Howard e Raj costituiscono un circolo sociale di nerd pronto ad ampliarsi con l'arrivo della nuova vicina aspirante ... (https://www.netflix.com/it/title/70143830)  The Big Bang Theory is a popular American sitcom that aired from 2007 to 2019. Created by Chuck Lorre and Bill Prady, the show follows the daily lives of a group of young scientists and how their nerd and geek status affects their relationships with the world around them. The show was highly acclaimed, with 12 seasons and 279 episodes, making it the longest-running multicamera sitcom in the history of American television. The show has won numerous awards, including 10 Emmy Awards. The show has a solid fanbase and has generated a spin-off called Young Sheldon. fields.value: The Louisiana Purchase was the acquisition of the territory of Louisiana by the United States from the French First Republic in 1803. This consisted of most ... (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Louisiana_Purchase)  The Louisiana Purchase was the acquisition of the territory of Louisiana by the United States from the French First Republic in 1803. The purchase consisted of most of the land in the Mississippi River's drainage basin west of the river. In return for fifteen million dollars, the United States nominally acquired a total of 828,000 sq mi in Middle America. The Louisiana Purchase extended United States sovereignty across the Mississippi River, nearly doubling the nominal size of the country. The purchase included land from fifteen present U.S. states and two Canadian provinces, including the entirety of Arkansas, Missouri, Iowa, Oklahoma, Kansas, and Nebraska; large portions of North Dakota and South Dakota; the area of Montana, Wyoming, and Colorado east of the Continental Divide; the portion of Minne

fields.value: 10 ott 2022 — Plankton and algae make up the bulk of their diets. They're particularly prone to feeding on blue-green algae known as cyanobacteria that ... (https://a-z-animals.com/blog/what-do-flamingos-eat/)  Flamingos are omnivorous filter-feeders that eat anything from shrimp to seeds. Their diet varies depending on the species, with deep-keeled flamingos being more vegetarian and shallow-keeled flamingos having more carnivorous diets. They forage for food by sticking their bills in shallow bodies of water and then pushing out the water and mud while amassing nutritious solid matter inside the bill. Flamingos are pink because of the high levels of beta-carotene in the food they eat, specifically blue-green algae and brine shrimp. They are able to survive in harsh environments and thrive in water that would be toxic to other birds due to several adaptations, including filtering salt out of water and filtering water for their food. 29 giu 2021 — They eat algae, small seeds, tiny crustaceans (like brine shri

(https://farmeda.lt/lt/saginil-ovules)  The webpage is for Saginil ovules, a medical product used to reduce vaginal irritation, dryness, and pain due to inflammation, antiseptics, or local contraceptive use, and treatment with antiestrogenic drugs. The ovules contain adelmidrol, which physiologically suppresses inflammation, soothes irritation and itching, strengthens the protective function of the mucous membranes, and improves lubrication. The recommended usage is one ovule per vagina every other day, preferably before bedtime, for a course of 10-20 days. The ovules can be used in combination with other pharmacological agents if necessary. Gelis su adelmidroliu ir hialurono rūgštimi.
